response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software development expertise and valuable open-source credentials aligned with the company's focus, critical gaps exist: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' when the role requires C1 (a likely deal-breaker for this Berlin position), and the resume lacks evidence of the IT architecture, system design, and technical project management leadership central to a Head of Development role. The candidate appears better positioned as a senior/staff developer than an executive-level tech lead.
strengths: 15+ years of modern software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with proven ability to work effectively across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source credentials including founding GISCollective, FOSS4G conference talks, and multiple published open-source projects demonstrating alignment with company's specialization
Demonstrated leadership and mentoring abilities through staff/senior roles at multiple companies, creation of workshops, and code kata organization
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' when role explicitly requires C1 minimum for this Berlin-based position—likely a blocking issue
Resume lacks demonstrated expertise in IT architecture, system design leadership, UML, and technical project management—core responsibilities of this Head of Development role
No evidence of experience with IT security, risk management, compliance, or requirements management—all explicitly required qualifications for the position

key_factors.factor: IT architecture and system design leadership experience
